'''yanoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zadakat|zadakat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zadakat|zadakat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yanoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yænereth|yænereth]] || [[word:yænerej|yænerej]] || [[word:yæneresh|yæneresh]] || [[word:yænere|yænere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yanonoroth|yanonoroth]] || [[word:yanonoroj|yanonoroj]] || [[word:yanonorosh|yanonorosh]] || [[word:yanonoro|yanonoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yanoroth|yanoroth]] || [[word:yanoroj|yanoroj]] || [[word:yanorosh|yanorosh]] || [[word:yanoro|yanoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yanofroth|yanofroth]] || [[word:yanofroj|yanofroj]] || [[word:yanofrosh|yanofrosh]] || [[word:yanofrof|yanofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yanorotho|yanorotho]] || [[word:yanorojo|yanorojo]] || [[word:yanorosho|yanorosho]] || [[word:yanoroko|yanoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yanoroth|yanoroth]] || [[word:yanoroj|yanoroj]] || [[word:yanorosh|yanorosh]] || [[word:yanoro|yanoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yanorothol|yanorothol]] || [[word:yanorojol|yanorojol]] || [[word:yanoroshol|yanoroshol]] || [[word:yanorokol|yanorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yanorothotho|yanorothotho]] || [[word:yanorojojo|yanorojojo]] || [[word:yanoroshosho|yanoroshosho]] || [[word:yanoroko|yanoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yanorothon|yanorothon]] || [[word:yanorojon|yanorojon]] || [[word:yanoroshon|yanoroshon]] || [[word:yanorokon|yanorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yanorothoro|yanorothoro]] || [[word:yanorojoro|yanorojoro]] || [[word:yanoroshoro|yanoroshoro]] || [[word:yanorokoro|yanorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
